title: Briful 25.5cm Tall Glass Vase Cylinder Flower Vase Φ10cm Glossy Crysal Large Vases for Table Decoration, Clear Flower Vases for Living Room 10cm(D) x 25.5cm(H)
features: This simple flower vase has a great add-on that offers real added value. Large vase glass cylinder has a drop shape bubble in the bottom. This turns a rather simple glass decoration into a real highlight for your banquet table or for decoration in your own four walls.

The cylindrical glass vase proves to be as compact as it is versatile. What looks like a simple flower vase becomes an indispensable element if you like to make floral decorations yourself. Depending on the season, you can use the vessel to create new decorations again and again.

The round flower vase for decoration is about 25.5cm high with a diameter of about 10cm. Combine other glass vases, which you will also find in different versions in our extensive range of vases made of glass.

With this round glass vase you have a versatile glass cylinder for your table decoration all year round. With its tall, straight shape and spacious opening, the large flower vase as a cylinder offers enough space for a variety of decorative glass ideas.

If you have such a glass cylinder as a flower vase , you can decorate the large glass vase for Christmas, arrange flowers in the glass cylinder in spring, give a bouquet in the glass vase for Mother's Day or decorate the glass vase for autumn.
description: Large Vase Glass Cylinder Vase: - The beautiful glass vessel is not only suitable as a glass vase for bouquets of cut flowers, dried flowers or silk flowers. - You can also put an LED light in the glass vase for decoration or use it as an original gift. - Depending on the season and the occasion, you can use ribbons, cords or decorative wire to attach beads, small pendants or natural materials such as twigs or cones to decorate this tall vase for flowers.
